Spring Data Elasticsearch

    Serialized Form

    • Package org.springframework.data.elasticsearch

      • Exception Class org.springframework.data.elasticsearch.BulkFailureException

        class BulkFailureException extends DataRetrievalFailureException implements Serializable

        • Serialized Fields

          • failedDocuments
            Map<String, BulkFailureException.FailureDetails> failedDocuments

      • Exception Class org.springframework.data.elasticsearch.NoSuchIndexException

        class NoSuchIndexException extends NonTransientDataAccessResourceException implements Serializable

        • Serialized Fields

          • index
            String index

      • Exception Class org.springframework.data.elasticsearch.ResourceFailureException

        class ResourceFailureException extends NestedRuntimeException implements Serializable

      • Exception Class org.springframework.data.elasticsearch.ResourceNotFoundException

        class ResourceNotFoundException extends NonTransientDataAccessResourceException implements Serializable

      • Exception Class org.springframework.data.elasticsearch.RestStatusException

        class RestStatusException extends DataAccessException implements Serializable

        • Serialized Fields

          • status
            int status

      • Exception Class org.springframework.data.elasticsearch.UncategorizedElasticsearchException

        class UncategorizedElasticsearchException extends UncategorizedDataAccessException implements Serializable

        • Serialized Fields

          • responseBody
            @Nullable String responseBody
            The response body from Elasticsearch if available
            Since:
            4.4
          • statusCode
            @Nullable Integer statusCode
            the response status code from Elasticsearch if available
            Since:
            4.4

      • Exception Class org.springframework.data.elasticsearch.VersionConflictException

        class VersionConflictException extends DataIntegrityViolationException implements Serializable

    • Package org.springframework.data.elasticsearch.client

      • Exception Class org.springframework.data.elasticsearch.client.NoReachableHostException

        class NoReachableHostException extends RuntimeException implements Serializable

      • Exception Class org.springframework.data.elasticsearch.client.UnsupportedBackendOperation

        class UnsupportedBackendOperation extends RuntimeException implements Serializable

      • Exception Class org.springframework.data.elasticsearch.client.UnsupportedClientOperationException

        class UnsupportedClientOperationException extends RuntimeException implements Serializable

    • Package org.springframework.data.elasticsearch.client.elc

      • Exception Class org.springframework.data.elasticsearch.client.elc.CriteriaQueryException

        class CriteriaQueryException extends UncategorizedDataAccessException implements Serializable

    • Package org.springframework.data.elasticsearch.core.convert

      • Exception Class org.springframework.data.elasticsearch.core.convert.ConversionException

        class ConversionException extends RuntimeException implements Serializable

      • Exception Class org.springframework.data.elasticsearch.core.convert.MappingConversionException

        class MappingConversionException extends RuntimeException implements Serializable

        • Serialized Fields

          • documentId
            String documentId

    • Package org.springframework.data.elasticsearch.core.query

      • Class org.springframework.data.elasticsearch.core.query.Criteria.CriteriaChain

        class CriteriaChain extends LinkedList<Criteria> implements Serializable

      • Class org.springframework.data.elasticsearch.core.query.GeoDistanceOrder

        class GeoDistanceOrder extends Order implements Serializable

        • Serialized Fields

          • distanceType
            GeoDistanceOrder.DistanceType distanceType
          • geoPoint
            GeoPoint geoPoint
          • ignoreUnmapped

          • unit
            String unit

      • Class org.springframework.data.elasticsearch.core.query.Order

        class Order extends Sort.Order implements Serializable

          • missing
            @Nullable String missing
          • mode
            @Nullable Order.Mode mode
          • nested
            @Nullable Order.Nested nested
          • unmappedType
